title: Senior Doctor - Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners:
Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners!
